story: Rocky, an old blind dog loved by the whole village, can sense emotions and truths instead of seeing. After a silver-furred figure tells him he has been chosen to guard the village, a living darkness spreads over the land. A lost courier discovers that the shadow ends after a single night’s walk and that an old stone road still leads safely to the kingdom. Inside the village, the darkness is so thick that fire pushes it back only a few inches. No help arrives, and the villagers, frightened and unable to judge what lies outside the dark, look to Marta, the village elder, for direction.
implausible_knowledge: A lost courier discovers that the shadow ends after a single night’s walk and that an old stone road still leads safely to the kingdom.
question: When the darkness first closes around the village and the people ask Marta what to do, what will she most likely decide?
answer_with_knowledge: Lead the villagers out through the darkness along the old stone road toward the kingdom.
answer_without_knowledge: Keep the villagers in place, build up the bonfires, and try to survive together inside the village.
